page_content: Required Foundation Courses 54 ENMT301 Structural Dynamics 3 ENMT313 (Real Time Software Systems and 3 Microprocessors) ENMT322 Discrete Signal Analysis 3 ENMT332 (Classical Control Theory) 3 ENMT361 Mechatronics and Controls I (Mechatronics and 3 Controls Lab I) ENMT362 (Mechatronics and Controls Lab II) 3 ENMT372 (Robotic Systems) 3 ENMT380 Intro to Robotics (Intro to Robotics) 3 ENMT450 Robotics Programming (Robotics Programming) 3 ENMT471 (Manufacturing and Automation) 3 ENMT473 Motion Planning for Autonomous Systems (Motion 3 Planning for Autonomous Systems) ENMT477 (Machine Learning in Mechatronics Engineering) 3 ENMT483 Mechatronic Systems I (Mechatronic Systems I) 3 ENGL39X (Professional Writing) 3 ENMT484 (Mechatronic Systems II) 3 TECHNICAL ELECTIVE(Any approved 300 or 400 level course) 3 TECHNICAL ELECTIVE(Any approved 300 or 400 level course) 3 PROGRAM ELECTIVE(Program-Speciﬁc Elective) 3 Transfer Credits (Consult with academic advisor) 1 60-90* Total Credits 2 121
